# Vue 3 PWA Project - Copilot Instructions

## Project Overview
This is a modern Vue 3 PWA application built with Vite, featuring:
- Vue 3 Composition API
- Vue Router for navigation
- Pinia for state management
- vite-plugin-pwa for offline support
- ESLint and Prettier for code quality
- Vercel deployment ready

## Development Workflow
- Use `npm run dev` to start development server
- Use `npm run build` to create production build
- Use `npm run preview` to preview production build
- Use `npm run lint` to run ESLint
- Use `npm run format` to format code with Prettier

## Key Files
- `vite.config.js` - Vite configuration with PWA plugin
- `vercel.json` - Vercel deployment configuration
- `.eslintrc.cjs` - ESLint configuration
- `.prettierrc` - Prettier configuration
- `public/manifest.webmanifest` - PWA manifest
- `public/sw.js` - Service worker (generated by vite-plugin-pwa)

## Architecture
- `src/components/` - Reusable Vue components
- `src/views/` - Page components
- `src/router/` - Vue Router configuration
- `src/stores/` - Pinia state stores
- `src/composables/` - Reusable composition functions
- `src/services/` - API and external service calls
- `src/utils/` - Utility functions
- `src/assets/` - Static assets and icons

## Vercel Deployment
No additional configuration needed. The project is pre-configured for Vercel:
- `vercel.json` handles build output
- Service worker and PWA manifest are in `public/`
- Build output goes to `dist/`
